title: M@phiybosheth #4648
definition:
Mephibosheth = "exterminating the idol"

 1) grandson of Saul and son of Rizpah the daughter of Aiah, Saul's
    concubine; he and his brother Armoni were among the 7 victims
    surrendered by David to the Gibeonites to avert a famine
 2) son of Jonathan and grandson of Saul
    2a) also 'Merib-baal'
nasbUsage:
Definition: Mephibosheth = "exterminating the idol"

 1) grandson of Saul and son of Rizpah the daughter of Aiah, Saul's
    concubine; he and his brother Armoni were among the 7 victims
    surrendered by David to the Gibeonites to avert a famine
 2) son of Jonathan and grandson of Saul
    2a) also 'Merib-baal'

    NASB:  dispeller of shame, another name for 4807
